footer.subscribeSub: Get the latest updates on new products and upcoming sales.

auth.signInToAccount: Sign in to your account to continue
auth.joinUs: Join us and start shopping today
auth.verificationSentDesc: We have sent a verification link to your email: {{email}}. Please check your inbox (and spam folder) and click the link to activate your account.
auth.resendSuccess: Verification link has been successfully resent to your email!
auth.resendError: Failed to resend the link. Please try again later.
auth.emailNotVerifiedError: Your email is not verified yet. Please activate your account via the link sent to you, or click here to resend a new activation link.
auth.loginError: Failed to sign in. Please check your credentials.
auth.registerSuccess: Account created successfully! Please activate it via the email sent to you.
auth.signOutError: Failed to sign out. Please try again.
auth.googleLoginError: Failed to connect to Google. Please try again.

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.firstNameMin: First name must be at least 2 characters
errors.lastNameMin: Last name must be at least 2 characters
errors.fullNameMin: Full name must be at least 3 characters
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid login credentials. Please check your email and password.
errors.emailNotVerified: Your email is not verified yet. Please check your inbox or resend the verification link.
errors.userAlreadyExists: This email is already registered. Please use another email or sign in.
errors.linkExpired: The verification link has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Email rate limit exceeded. Please wait a moment before trying again.
errors.genericError: Operation failed. Please try again later.

delivery.sectionDesc: We offer the best services to ensure a comfortable and secure shopping experience for all our customers.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.desc: Sorry, we couldn’t find the page you’re looking for. It might have been moved or deleted.
